review_text: Hands down the best Fresh Lime Soda I've ever had! Fresh Lime Soda  Chicken Tikka Masala  Mango Lassi  and Garlic Naan were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Good quality food. Aloo Tikki Chaat  Malai Kofta  Jeera Rice  Tandoori Roti  and Butter Chicken were nicely done. Malai Kofta could have been slightly spicier but still good!
Enjoyed the Vegetable Biryani  Fish Curry  Chicken 65  and Rasmalai (2 pcs)! Chicken 65 was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Poor experience. Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Gajar Halwa  and Sweet Lassi were disappointing. Sweet Lassi was burnt on the edges. Very unhappy.
Absolutely amazing Vegetable Biryani  Butter Chicken  and Butter Naan! The Vegetable Biryani was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Enjoyed the Mango Lassi  Paneer Butter Masala  Fish Curry  Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  and Kulfi! Mango Lassi was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Good quality food. Palak Paneer were nicely done. Palak Paneer could have been slightly spicier but still good!
Average experience. Fresh Lime Soda  Vegetable Biryani  Malai Kofta  and Butter Naan were fine but Fresh Lime Soda was a bit bland. Room for improvement.
Decent food but nothing special. Chicken Tikka Masala were okay. Chicken Tikka Masala lacked the punch I expected.
Mixed feelings. Fish Curry  Samosa (2 pcs)  Butter Naan  and Tandoori Roti were acceptable. Fish Curry was decent but portion was small for the price.
Pleasant meal! Chicken 65  Butter Chicken  Lamb Rogan Josh  Chicken Biryani  and Jeera Rice arrived warm. Jeera Rice was tasty though not exceptional. Would order again.
Exceptional quality! Ordered Sweet Lassi  Gajar Halwa  and Paneer Tikka and everything was delicious. The Gajar Halwa melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Solid experience. Naan  Gajar Halwa  Chicken Tikka Masala  and Jeera Rice were well-prepared. Chicken Tikka Masala had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Hands down the best Naan I've ever had! Naan were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Wow! Just wow! Samosa (2 pcs) and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) were all fantastic. Samosa (2 pcs) was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Hands down the best Naan I've ever had! Gajar Halwa  Butter Naan  Mango Lassi  Naan  and Garlic Naan were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Solid experience. Butter Chicken and Kulfi were well-prepared. Butter Chicken had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Perfect in every way! Jeera Rice  Naan  Fish Curry  Kulfi  and Lamb Rogan Josh were all excellent. Kulfi stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
Perfect in every way! Gajar Halwa  Palak Paneer  Jeera Rice  and Fresh Lime Soda were all excellent. Palak Paneer stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
Enjoyed the Gajar Halwa! Gajar Halwa was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Absolutely amazing Paneer Tikka! The Paneer Tikka was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Absolutely amazing Aloo Tikki Chaat  Sweet Lassi  Dal Makhani  Gajar Halwa  and Malai Kofta! The Gajar Halwa was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
